  "action_vector": {
    "funding_boost":       0.8,

  "reasoning": "Right now, I'm worried about the mass exodus of our best teachers. We need to hold onto the ones we have, so I'm betting big on teacher incentives. Transparency reports will help me monitor class sizes and attendance, but I'm not going to risk burning out our remaining staff with a new attendance mandate. Funding boosts and resource reallocation will help us patch up the shortfalls, and counseling programs will give our kids a safety net. As for new hires, I'll wait until the dust settles.",
  "confidence": 0.85
}
